allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add NCC Orphans Court migration script and source data

Python script \(migrate.py\) transforms Access database exports
\(Adults + Children + Containers CSVs\) into ArchivERA-ready 30-column
import format. Handles deceased parents, foundlings, container matching
via alphabetical surname lookup, and zero-padded RG/Series fields.

Includes NCC source data, gold standard reference, and documentation.
Verified against 5-record sample — all fields match except intentional
improvements \(zero-padding\) and expected manual-review flags \(foundlings\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
